Home / Project Management & Kanban / Taiga

Taiga — open source alternative

Agile project management with Scrum and Kanban.

Strengths

  • Dedicated Scrum and Kanban flows.
  • Clean, focused UI.
  • Free cloud tier available.

Weaknesses

  • Self-hosting is multi-service.
  • Smaller integration ecosystem than Jira.
  • Reporting features are lighter.
License: Mozilla-2.0 Self-host difficulty: 3/5 Hosted cloud option

Official site · Source on GitHub

Ad slot — OSS middle

Taiga is used as an alternative to

Asana

Project and task management for teams.

See all alternatives →

Jira

Issue tracking and agile planning.

See all alternatives →

Linear

Streamlined issue tracking built for software teams.

See all alternatives →
